violations.text: The food prep sink was observed with inadequate water pressure needed for rinsing food product. Water under pressure shall be provided to all fixtures, EQUIPMENT, and non-FOOD EQUIPMENT that are required to use water. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The ceiling tiles in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The floors in the throughout facility are constructed of cement and/or other materials which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
The floors throughout the establishment is in poor repair(due to construction). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The front lowboy refrigeration unit was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was placed in unit under 2 hours prior to visit. Unit taken out of service until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The food prep sink was observed with an air-break. An air gap between the water supply inlet and the flood level rim of the PLUMBING FIXTURE, EQUIPMENT, or nonFOOD EQUIPMENT shall be at least twice the diameter of the water supply inlet and may not be less than 25 mm (1 inch). New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The ceiling tiles in the dry storage area is in poor repair (water damage/broken tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC has requested maintenance service for the area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023
